name: Laidback Luke
description: '''Lucas Cornelis van Scheppingen''' (born 22 October 1976), better known under his stage name '''Laidback Luke''', is a Filipino-born Dutch [[disc jockey|DJ]] and [[record producer]]. He is the founder of [[Mixmash Records]] and is widely credited as a key figure in the rise of [[electro house]] and Dutch house music in the late 2000s. He has collaborated with artists including [[Swedish House Mafia]], [[Steve Aoki]], [[David Guetta]], and [[James Brown]], and has remixed recordings by [[Madonna (entertainer)|Madonna]], [[Mariah Carey]], [[Nicki Minaj]], [[Daft Punk]], and [[Depeche Mode]], among others.
